headline: NCLH Leans on Turnaround Strategy: Is Performance Set to Improve?
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line pushes a turnaround plan to fix execution gaps, boost efficiency and unlock revenues, but meaningful gains may not fully emerge until 2027.

headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NCLH) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.
